name: Governance Dashboard
description: Repo governance scanner and Control UI cockpit for OpenClaw

enabled.label: Enable Governance Dashboard
enabled.help: Turn the governance scanner and dashboard RPC on or off.

repoRoot.label: Repository Root
repoRoot.help: Optional absolute path to the OpenClaw repository. Leave empty to auto-detect.

refreshIntervalMs.label: Refresh Interval (ms)
refreshIntervalMs.help: How often the background service refreshes cached governance data.

largeFileLineThreshold.label: Large File Threshold
largeFileLineThreshold.help: Files above this line count are flagged as governance hotspots.

hotspotLimit.label: Hotspot Limit
hotspotLimit.help: Maximum number of hotspots shown in the dashboard snapshot.

focusPaths.label: Focus Paths
focusPaths.help: Top-level repo paths scanned for large-file hotspot analysis.
